featurebase_fullstack.title: Full-stack Engineer

featurebase_fullstack.summary: Full-stack product-leaning engineer with a frontend and mobile core, plus 4+ years building production applications across healthcare, logistics, and digital product environments. Strong experience with React Native, TypeScript, JavaScript, REST APIs, Redux, Firebase, and shipping reliable user-facing features in small, high-ownership teams. Comfortable owning features end to end, improving product quality through debugging and iteration, and working asynchronously in lean remote environments.

bullets: Built and maintained production applications using React Native, JavaScript, and API-connected workflows for operational teams, with emphasis on reliability and user experience.
Integrated REST APIs and Redux-based state management for complex user flows and data-heavy product interactions.
Improved quality through debugging, structured testing, and iterative enhancement of user-facing features in real operational settings.
Worked across technical and business stakeholders and mentored junior developers on maintainable application structure and delivery discipline.
Developed customer-facing product flows and reusable front-end components for an e-commerce platform in a remote collaboration setup.
Improved app load speed by 35% through front-end optimization and performance-focused refinement.
Partnered with backend teams to deliver API-connected features and improve the product experience end to end.

Coordinated implementation decisions, API-connected workflows, and product improvements in a high-trust environment.

Product Delivery: debugging, performance optimization, asynchronous collaboration, feature ownership, agile execution.
